mnemonics: CSV: Comma Separated Values (Remember the 'C' stands for Comma, not Column)
keyPoints: Use pandas.read_csv() for efficient CSV file reading
Specify the correct delimiter (e.g., comma, tab, space) for text files
Handle missing values and data types during the reading process
commonMistakes: Forgetting to specify header=None when the file has no column headers
Not setting the correct encoding parameter (e.g., 'utf-8') for special characters
Assuming all values are read as the correct data type without explicit conversion
